_description: User's preferred routing. Research is a two-pass flow (Gemini primary, Claude augments). Audit/UX/Theming go to Codex. Claude Max handles build+counter-audit. Copilot handles deliver + universal fallback. Logo generation is ChatGPT-primary (transparent PNG) with Gemini fallback.
_image_generation_note: codex:image maps to OpenAI gpt-image-1 (supports transparent_background: true). Requires OPENAI_API_KEY in env or ~/.codex/auth.json. User currently has OAuth-only Codex auth (no API key); image generation will fall back to gemini:image until an API key is added. Generate key at https://platform.openai.com/api-keys → export OPENAI_API_KEY=sk-... in shell profile.

_tier_semantics.weak: cheap model for mechanical work: commit messages, diff summaries, lint-error interpretation, rubric-scoring. Cost target: 10-30% of primary.
_tier_semantics.editor: code-generation-focused model for actual file edits, when primary is better at reasoning than writing code. Falls back to primary if unset.
